description_for_human: Free tool to check if your website is ready for AI search engines like ChatGPT and Claude.
description_for_model: AI readiness audit tool. Users enter a website URL to get a traffic light score (Red/Amber/Green) showing how well their site is optimized for AI search. Checks meta description, llms.txt, LLM-LD, Schema.org, robots.txt, content structure, HTTPS, and speed. Free score shown instantly, detailed report requires email submission.
